languages.text: "Слуги Бога-Императора собрали твою голову из ничего, и это — твоя благодарность? Если бы я знал{mf||а}, что мой подданный не умеет превозмогать, то сам{mf||а} убил{mf||а} бы тебя!"

traits.locale_text: "Вернейшие слуги Бога-Императора собрали твою голову из ничего, слизняк. И это — твоя благодарность? Если бы я зна{mf|л|ла}, что мой подданый не умеет терпеть боль, то са{mf|м|ма} уби{mf|л|ла} бы тебя на операционном столе".

languages.text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"
languages.original_text: "Слуги Бога-Императора собрали твою голову из ничего, и это — твоя благодарность? Если бы я знал{mf||а}, что мой подданный не умеет превозмогать, то сам{mf||а} убил{mf||а} бы тебя!"

traits.locale_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put your head back together from the pieces, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

"The servants of the God-Emperor put your head back together from the pieces, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

"The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

"The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

languages.text: "Die Diener des Gottimperators haben Euren Kopf wieder zusammengesetzt und das ist Euer Dank? Hätte ich gewusst, dass mein Untertan keine Widerstände überwinden kann, hätte ich Euch selbst getötet!"
languages.original_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

traits.locale_text: "Die Diener des Gottimperators haben Euren Kopf wieder zusammengesetzt und das ist Euer Dank? Hätte ich gewusst, dass mein Untertan keine Widerstände überwinden kann, hätte ich Euch selbst getötet!"

languages.text: « Les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu ont réassemblé votre tête, et c'est ainsi que vous les remerciez ? Si j'avais su mon sujet incapable de surmonter l'adversité, je vous aurais tué de mes propres mains ! »
languages.original_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

traits.locale_text: « Les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu ont réassemblé votre tête, et c'est ainsi que vous les remerciez ? Si j'avais su mon sujet incapable de surmonter l'adversité, je vous aurais tué de mes propres mains ! »

languages.text: “神皇的仆从把你的脑袋重新拼好，你就这么报答他们？早知道我的属民连这点逆境都克服不了，当初我就该亲手宰了你！”
languages.original_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

traits.locale_text: “神皇的仆从把你的脑袋重新拼好，你就这么报答他们？早知道我的属民连这点逆境都克服不了，当初我就该亲手宰了你！”

languages.text: «Los sirvientes del Dios Emperador le reconstruyeron la cabeza, ¿y así les devuelve el favor? De haber sabido que mi súbdito sucumbiría así a la adversidad, ¡lo habría matado personalmente!».
languages.original_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

traits.locale_text: «Los sirvientes del Dios Emperador le reconstruyeron la cabeza, ¿y así les devuelve el favor? De haber sabido que mi súbdito sucumbiría así a la adversidad, ¡lo habría matado personalmente!».

languages.text: 「神帝のしもべたちが、バラバラになった頭を元通りにしてくれたのに、これがそのお返しですか？私の臣下が逆境に打ち勝つことができないと知っていたら、私がお前を殺していただろう！」
languages.original_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

traits.locale_text: 「神帝のしもべたちが、バラバラになった頭を元通りにしてくれたのに、これがそのお返しですか？私の臣下が逆境に打ち勝つことができないと知っていたら、私がお前を殺していただろう！」

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları, kafanın parçalarını birleştirdi. Böyle mi karşılık veriyorsun? Tebaamın zorlukların üstesinden gelemeyeceğini bilsem seni kendi ellerimle öldürürdüm!"
languages.original_text: "The servants of the God-Emperor put the pieces of your head back together, and this is how you repay them? If I had known that my subject was incapable of overcoming adversity, I would have killed you myself!"

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları, kafanın parçalarını birleştirdi. Böyle mi karşılık veriyorsun? Tebaamın zorlukların üstesinden gelemeyeceğini bilsem seni kendi ellerimle öldürürdüm!"
